title: 日本ダービーの後に・悔

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having let first place slip through her fingers at
the Japanese Derby, Narita Brian grits her teeth,
swallows her disappointment, and vows to get
even stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, Hishi Amazon has just won her
second tiara on the Tiara tour. The two of them
decide to settle their rivalry at the Arima Kinen
once both Classic Triple Crown series are
finished.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The challenge spikes Narita Brian's fighting spirit.
Before that match, however, we have the Kikuka
Sho—the final race of the Classic Triple Crown!
